public repo checklist: before going public — 1) audit all committed files for secrets/tokens (grep xoxb xapp api_key password), 2) scrub git history of any leaked tokens, 3) review CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md for internal-only info, 4) add proper LICENSE file, 5) write public-facing README with install/demo, 6) set up GitHub Releases workflow for binary distribution, 7) verify wkappbot update works without gh CLI (HttpClient release API)
